first_run.rationale: The score is unchanged, and the reasoning in both evaluations is substantively identical. Both versions correctly identify the same severe skill mismatches for the role (lack of native Japanese, embedded firmware, and kernel experience). The minor differences in phrasing are consistent with normal run-to-run variation and do not introduce any new logic or emphasis related to the change in location.
